title: GENESIS
tagline: Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups — deep-tech funding for Tier-II/III city entrepreneurs.
funder: Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), Govt. of India
objectives: Consolidation of MeitY startup-related schemes and assets for greater efficiency and enhanced startup support
Provide Tier-II/III cities focused funding to critically support Pilot, Investment, Early-stage, and Deep-tech startups
Strengthen incubators and build a stronger startup ecosystem via capacity building initiatives in Tier-II/III cities
eligibility: Technology startup based in or operating from Tier-II or Tier-III cities
Focus on GENESIS deep-tech domains: AI/ML, IoT, VLSI/Semiconductors, Cybersecurity, Blockchain, Quantum, AR/VR, or Electronic Design & Manufacturing
Only Indian citizens may apply (EIR vertical)
Startups must not have received significant external funding exceeding ₹10 lakh including government grants
Must not have been previously supported under any MeitY scheme (for EIR vertical)
DPIIT-registered startups preferred for Pilot and Matching Investment verticals

fundingVerticals.name: Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EIR)
fundingVerticals.purpose: Support for full-time UG/PG students or early founders working on ideation, concept development, PoC, or prototyping in electronics, IT, or deep-tech

fundingVerticals.name: Pilot Funding
fundingVerticals.purpose: Enable DPIIT-registered startups with an MVP/working prototype to validate and deploy their solution through structured pilot projects with corporates, PSUs, or large enterprises

fundingVerticals.name: Matching Investment
fundingVerticals.purpose: 1:1 matched investment for market-ready startups with validated solutions and proof of concept, targeting those raising from VCs or angel investors
fundingVerticals.note: Requires matching private or institutional investment; government grants do not count

fundingVerticals.name: Deep-Tech Funding
fundingVerticals.purpose: Sustained R&D support for deep-tech ventures requiring long gestation periods

support: Financial assistance up to ₹50 Lakhs for prototype development, product creation, and scaling
Mentorship from industry leaders and domain experts
State-of-the-art infrastructure: co-working spaces, labs, and testing centres
Networking opportunities with investors, corporates, and government bodies
Training programmes, workshops, bootcamps, and skill enhancement courses
about: GENESIS (Gen-Next Support for Innovative Startups) is a MeitY scheme with a ₹490 Crore, 5-year outlay designed to nurture approximately 1,600 deep-tech startups, with a deliberate focus on Tier-II and Tier-III cities. IC IITP is a GENESIS incubation partner. The scheme offers four funding verticals — EIR grants, Pilot Funding, Matching Investment, and Deep-Tech Funding — across AI/ML, IoT, VLSI/Semiconductors, Cybersecurity, Blockchain, Quantum, and AR/VR. IC IITP has already incubated 4 startups under GENESIS.
